VendorProcessManagerV1
Table of Contents

Class ProcessInstance

Namespace
VendorProcessManagerV1.Models
Assembly
VendorProcessManagerV1.dll

Represents a single instance of a process generated by choosing an existing template.

public class ProcessInstance

The date the process was completed.

public DateTime? ActualEndDate { get; set; }

The date the process instance was created.

Unique identifier for the ProcessInstance

Property Value

Guid

InitiatedBy

The details of the initiator.

public AppUser InitiatedBy { get; set; }

Property Value

AppUser

InitiatedById

The link to the initiator of the process instance.

public string InitiatedById { get; set; }

Property Value

string

InstanceName

The name for this specific process instance. It is set by the user but the suggested name is a combination of date and template name.

public string InstanceName { get; set; }

Property Value

string

ProcessTemplate

The details of the originating template.

public ProcessTemplate ProcessTemplate { get; set; }

Property Value

ProcessTemplate

ProcessTemplateId

The link to the originating template for this instance.

public Guid ProcessTemplateId { get; set; }

Property Value

Guid

StartDate

The date the process was started.

public DateTime? StartDate { get; set; }

Property Value

DateTime?

Status

The status of the process instance.

public ProcessInstanceStatus Status { get; set; }

ProcessInstanceStatus

TargetEndDate

The date the process is targeted to end.

public DateTime? TargetEndDate { get; set; }

Property Value

DateTime?

Tasks

The set of tasks associated with this process instance.

public ICollection<ProcessTask> Tasks { get; set; }

ICollection<ProcessTask>

The details of the vendor candidate.

The link to the vendor candidate that is being moved throught the process
